> **官方文档：** [https://rclone.org/commands/rclone_config_paths/](https://rclone.org/commands/rclone_config_paths/)
# rclone config paths

显示用于配置、缓存、临时文件等的路径。

```
rclone config paths [flags]
```

## 选项

```
  -h, --help   help for paths
```

请参阅 [全局 flags 页面](/flags/) 了解此处未列出的全局选项。
